categories.name: Manual Washers
categories.shortDescription: Sink-style, vat-style, and high-pressure manual aqueous parts washers for shop-floor degreasing
categories.description: Magido manual aqueous parts washers are engineered to handle the most rigorous cleaning challenges found in industrial and automotive maintenance applications. Available in sink-style, vat-style, and high-pressure cabinet configurations, these systems use environmentally safe water-based cleaning solutions to effectively remove oils, greases, dirt, and grime. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, Magido manual washers deliver reliable performance with minimal maintenance — ideal for shop-floor degreasing where hands-on control is essential.

categories.name: Top Load Washers
categories.shortDescription: Automatic spray cabinet washers for small to mid-sized machined parts — cutting oil, coolant, and chip removal
categories.description: Magido top load aqueous parts washers are engineered for automatic spray washing applications using aqueous detergents at temperatures up to 150°F. Each system features a motorized rotating turntable and precision-angled jet nozzles that deliver thorough, consistent cleaning coverage across all part surfaces. Available in compact, standard, and high-performance configurations with turntable sizes ranging from 14" to 55" in diameter, these washers handle everything from small precision components to medium-sized industrial parts. All machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel with options for filtration, rinsing, and drying stages.

categories.name: Front Load Washers
categories.shortDescription: Heavy-duty spray cabinet washers for large, heavy industrial components — automotive, aerospace, heavy equipment
categories.description: Magido front load aqueous parts washers are engineered for automatic spray washing of large, heavy components using aqueous detergents at temperatures up to 160°F. The operation principle uses a fixed platform with a series of angled water jet nozzles configured on a spray ramp to optimally clean all part surfaces. Front load systems feature a removable turntable that transfers easily onto a mobile cart for convenient loading and unloading outside the wash chamber. All machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel with options for filtration, rinsing, and drying stages — built for high-throughput production environments.

categories.name: Immersion Washers
categories.shortDescription: Full-submersion aqueous parts washers for complex internal geometries — hydraulic components, castings, blind holes
categories.description: Magido immersion aqueous parts washers are designed for thorough cleaning of parts with complex geometries using a full-submersion agitation process. Parts are lowered into a heated aqueous cleaning solution via a pneumatic platform that oscillates to facilitate the cleaning process, reaching internal passages and intricate features that spray washing alone cannot. Operating at temperatures up to 167°F, these systems are ideal for precision components, machined parts, and assemblies requiring complete surface contact. All machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel and are characterized by their cleaning platform size and load capacity.

categories.name: In-Line Belt Conveyor Washers
categories.shortDescription: Continuous high-volume aqueous parts washing integrated into production lines — automotive and machining applications
categories.description: Magido in-line belt conveyor aqueous parts washers are designed for continuous, high-volume cleaning integrated directly into your production line. Parts are loaded onto a stainless steel mesh belt that carries them through single-stage or dual-stage wash and rinse zones at controlled speeds, delivering consistent results without manual handling. Available in compact Silver series and high-capacity Gold series configurations, these systems use environmentally safe aqueous cleaning solutions and are built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. Ideal for manufacturing operations that demand automated throughput with repeatable cleaning quality.

categories.name: Rotary Drum Washers
categories.shortDescription: Helical drum aqueous parts washers for bulk cleaning of small loose parts — fasteners, stampings, turned components
categories.description: Magido rotary drum aqueous parts washers use a helical auger drum system for continuous bulk cleaning of small, loose parts such as fasteners, stampings, and machined components. Parts are loaded into one end of the rotating drum and are carried through the wash zone by the internal helix, emerging clean at the other end — enabling non-stop processing without batching. Available in single-stage and dual-stage configurations with wash and rinse capabilities, all machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel. These systems are the right choice for high-volume operations requiring consistent, automated cleaning.

categories.name: Rotary Immersion Washers
categories.shortDescription: Multi-action rotary immersion washers — spray, immersion, and rotation for precision aerospace and automotive parts
categories.description: Magido rotary immersion aqueous parts washers combine turbulent immersion washing with spray cleaning to deliver superior results on parts with complex geometries. During the cleaning cycle, parts in baskets or fixtures are rotated through an immersion bath while simultaneously receiving spray cleaning, followed by spray and immersion rinsing with an available drying stage. Each system is customizable to your exact specifications and built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. These multi-action washers are ideal for critical components in aerospace, automotive, and precision manufacturing where thorough, repeatable cleaning is essential.

series.name: X51 Series
series.description: The X51 Series is Magido's most popular automatic top load spray cabinet line — built for shops that need reliable, hands-off aqueous cleaning of small to mid-sized machined parts. Parts load onto an automatic rotating turntable (35"–51" diameter) and are cleaned by calibrated V-jet spray nozzles at up to 140°F, removing cutting oils, coolants, and metallic fines. All four models share the same single-stage wash architecture; size is the differentiator — the L101/L102 share a 35" basket at 440 lbs, the L122 steps to 45" at 770 lbs, and the L152 tops out at 51". The L102 adds a second spray bar for more aggressive coverage. Optional drying, rinse stage, filtration, and oil skimmer available.
standardFeatures: Automatic Rotary Turntable with Sprocket Drive
V-Jet Spray Nozzle System (up to 58 nozzles)
Adjustable Solution Heater & Wash Cycle Timer
availableOptions: Stainless steel lid lifter (pneumatic or electric)

series.name: Gold 1b Series
series.description: The Gold 1b Series is Magido's primary single-stage in-line belt conveyor washer line, built for continuous high-volume cleaning integrated into production lines. Nine models span belt widths from 8" (G200) to 39" (G1000) with wash tanks from 90–140 gallons, covering small fasteners up to large stampings and machined housings. Parts ride the stainless steel mesh belt through precision spray zones at variable speeds (1–5 fpm). Standard features include Siemens PLC, NEMA 4 panel, insulated tanks, steam exhaust, and removable chip baskets. The single wash stage maximizes throughput per footprint. Optional pre-wash, rinse, rust prevention, enhanced drying, and filtration available.
standardFeatures: Heavy Duty Drive System With Variable Speed Control
NEMA 4 Electrical Panel With Disconnect Switch
Low Water Shut-Off & Automatic Water Fill Combination
Stainless Steel Wash Nozzles & Custom Header Manifold
Emergency Stop Button At Load & Unload Zones

series.name: Gold 2b Series
series.description: The Gold 2b Series adds a dedicated fresh-water rinse stage to the Gold 1b platform — the right choice when detergent carryover would compromise downstream painting, coating, or assembly. Nine models match the Gold 1b range exactly (8"–39" belt widths), with independent matched wash and rinse tanks (90–140 gallons per stage) and separate pumps on each stage. Belt speed is variable at 1–5 fpm. Common in automotive production lines, precision machining, and medical device manufacturing. Optional pre-wash, additional rinse, rust prevention, enhanced drying, advanced filtration, and oil skimmer available.
standardFeatures: Heavy Duty Drive System With Variable Speed Control
NEMA 4 Electrical Panel With Disconnect Switch
Low Water Shut-Off & Automatic Water Fill Combination
Stainless Steel Wash Nozzles & Custom Header Manifold
Emergency Stop Button At Load & Unload Zones

series.name: Silver Series
series.description: The Silver Series is Magido's compact entry-level belt conveyor washer line — continuous automated cleaning in a smaller footprint than the Gold Series. Three models cover 8"–16" belt widths with 40-gallon wash tanks. Belt speed runs 0.7–3.3 fpm, giving parts longer dwell time suited for lighter-volume production or higher-contamination loads. The right fit for small job shops, pilot lines, and machining cells that need conveyor-style throughput without the full scale of the Gold Series. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout. Optional rinse, rust prevention, blow-off/drying, filtration, and oil skimmer available.

series.name: DG Series
series.description: The DG Series is Magido's compact sink-style manual parts washer line — a simple, durable aqueous cleaning station for everyday shop floor degreasing. Both models share a 300-lb capacity and a flo-thru brush system powered by an external magnetic drive pump, delivering heated solution directly through the bristles for effective removal of oils, coolants, and light soils. A thermostat-controlled heater and liquid level shutoff are standard. The DG-9 offers a larger basin than the DG-8 for bigger parts. The right choice for toolrooms and maintenance shops that need a low-footprint, no-frills cleaning station without the automation of a spray cabinet. Optional cartridge filter and casters available.
standardFeatures: Electrical Heater Controlled by a Thermostat

series.name: L Series
series.description: The L Series (Manual) offers Magido's vat-style manual aqueous parts washers — a step up from the DG sink in capacity and work area. Both models feature a deep stainless steel vat with adjustable work grate, thermostat-controlled heater, liquid level sensor, and drain valve. The L-10 provides a larger basin (29") for longer or bulkier parts than the L-7 (19"). Parts soak in heated aqueous solution and are scrubbed by hand — effective for heavy grease and packed-in contamination that needs dwell time rather than high-pressure spray. Well suited for MRO, agricultural equipment, and heavy equipment shops. Cartridge or bag filtration available.

series.name: HP Series
series.description: The HP Series is Magido's high-pressure manual cabinet washer line, built for applications where spray impingement is more effective than soaking. An 870 PSI piston-drive pump powers an ergonomic spray wand inside an enclosed stainless steel cabinet, with LED lighting, a viewing window, and a window-clearing blower for visibility. The HP-30 offers a larger cabinet and tank than the HP-25 at the same 350-lb capacity. Particularly effective for removing paint, carbon, rust, and baked-on grease that lower-pressure washers can't shift. Typical applications include engine rebuilding, heavy equipment repair, fleet maintenance, and MRO. Oil skimmer and external filtration available.
standardFeatures: Liquid Level Sensor & Low Water Shut Off
Removable Work Tray & Screened Filter Basket

series.name: X81 Series
series.description: The X81 Series offers compact, entry-level automatic top load spray cabinet washers for lighter-duty cleaning in smaller shops, toolrooms, and maintenance environments. Three models span 15"–31" turntable diameters and 155–330-lb capacities, with 15–30-gallon solution tanks. Each uses the same rotating turntable and V-jet spray nozzle system as the X51, in a smaller footprint. Best for toolroom cleaning, small castings, stamped components, and prototype work where full X51 capacity isn't required. Options include drying, filtration, oil skimmer, and a lid lifter.
standardFeatures: Automatic Rotary Turntable with Sprocket Drive

series.name: Eco Series
series.description: The Eco Series is Magido's value-focused line of automatic top load washers — the essentials of spray cabinet cleaning in a straightforward, operator-friendly package. All four models use a sprocket-driven turntable and V-jet nozzle spray system, ranging from the L800FP (31" turntable, 350-lb capacity) to the L922FP (45" turntable, 440-lb capacity). The Eco delivers dependable automated cleaning for general manufacturing and MRO without the higher-specification components of the X51 Series. A practical choice for facilities watching budget without sacrificing reliability. Drying, filtration, and oil skimmer available.
standardFeatures: Automatic Rotary Turntable with Sprocket Drive

series.name: X51HP Series
series.description: The X51HP Series combines the X51 top load spray cabinet platform with an integrated high-pressure spray wand — adding manual spot-cleaning to the automatic wash cycle. Three models (35"–45" turntable, 440–770-lb capacity) run the standard automatic V-jet cycle, then allow operators to open the cabinet and target internal passages or stubborn contamination with the high-pressure wand. Ideal for complex castings, hydraulic components, and engine parts where automated cleaning alone isn't sufficient. Available with drying, rinse stage, filtration, and oil skimmer.

series.name: X51/2 Series
series.description: The X51/2 Series adds a dedicated rinse stage to Magido's core top load spray cabinet design — the right choice when parts will be painted, coated, or assembled to a precision fit. Dual PLC-controlled tanks (wash and rinse, independently heated) ensure the rinse stage uses clean solution throughout. Three models cover 35"–50" turntables and 440–1,102-lb capacities, with matched tank pairs up to 79/65 gallons. Typically specified for rust prevention, coating prep, and medical or food-grade applications where detergent residue cannot be tolerated. Drying, filtration, and oil skimmer available.

rows.name: Load Height with Removable Turntable option

standardFeatures: Dual Tanks — Wash & Rinse with PLC Control

series.name: X53 Series
series.description: The X53 Series is Magido's single-stage front load spray cabinet line, built for large, heavy components that can't be loaded from the top. A full-width front door with safety interlock allows forklift or cart loading of assemblies up to 1,500 lbs, with turntable basket sizes from 43"×43" (L160) to 71"×71" (L240) — handling gearboxes, engine blocks, and structural weldments that no top load cabinet could accommodate. Tank capacity scales from 77 to 185 gallons across the range. The go-to choice for heavy equipment, automotive, and aerospace components. Mobile loading carts, drying, rinse stage, oil skimmer, and filtration available.

series.name: X53/2 Series
series.description: The X53/2 Series is the dual-stage version of the X53 front load cabinet, adding a dedicated rinse stage for processes where detergent carryover is unacceptable. Independent wash and rinse tanks — PLC-controlled, separately heated — are capacity-matched at every model size (77–185 gallons per stage), and all models handle up to 1,500-lb loads through the front door. Specified for painting, coating, precision assembly, and export cleaning where cleanliness must be validated. Common in aerospace, heavy equipment, and high-spec automotive lines. Mobile loading carts, drying, oil skimmer, and filtration available.
standardFeatures: Dual Tanks — Wash & Rinse with PLC Control

series.name: Agita Series
series.description: The Agita Series is Magido's pneumatic platform immersion washer line, built for parts with complex internal geometries that spray-only systems can't reliably clean. Parts are fully submerged in heated solution while a pneumatic oscillating platform agitates the load, forcing solution in and out of blind passages and recesses. An oil sparger and weir system continuously skims surface oils to extend bath life. Four models scale from the A700 (70-gallon tank, 180-lb capacity) to the A1300 (180-gallon tank, 550-lb capacity), operating up to 170°F with Siemens PLC control. Preferred for hydraulic manifolds, deep-blind castings, and precision components requiring validated cleanliness. Optional ultrasonic cleaning, spray-under-immersion, and automatic lid available.
standardFeatures: Pneumatic Oscillating Immersion Platform — agitates parts during wash cycle
Oil Sparger & Weir System — continuously skims surface oils to extend fluid life
Thermally Insulated Tank — reduces energy consumption and heat loss
Strut-Assisted Lid for safe and easy access
availableOptions: Ultrasonic Cleaning Stage — enhanced removal of fine particulate and oils
24/7 Heat Controller — maintains solution temperature continuously
Automatic Water Fill with Fluid Level Sensor
Spray-Under-Immersion — adds spray impingement during immersion cycle
safetyFeatures: NEMA 4 Electrical Enclosure — splash and dust resistant
Liquid Level Shutoff — protects heating elements from dry-fire

series.name: Jolly Series
series.description: The Jolly Series is Magido's compact entry-level rotary drum washer line for bulk cleaning of small, loose parts that are impractical to load individually. Both models use a 12" diameter helical auger drum that submerges and advances parts through the wash zone simultaneously — parts tumble through combined submersion and spray cleaning and exit at the discharge end without individual handling. The J320 is single-stage (47" drum); the J320/2 adds a rinse stage (71" drum). Ideal for fasteners, small stampings, hardware, and turned components small enough to tumble freely without damage. Optional rust prevention, blow-off, drying, filtration, and oil skimmer available.

series.name: Spira 1b Series
series.description: The Spira 1b Series is Magido's main production-scale single-stage rotary drum washer line, covering a wider drum size range and higher throughputs than the Jolly. Four models scale from the SP320 (12" diameter × 67" drum) to the SP950 (37" diameter × 150" drum, 210-gallon tank). The helical auger drum continuously advances parts through the wash zone via submersion and spray, removing oils, coolants, and chips without individual part handling. Drum speed is adjustable for dwell time and tumbling intensity. A proven solution for automotive fasteners, small castings, and stamped components at production volume. Optional rinse, rust prevention, blow-off/drying, filtration, and oil skimmer available.

series.name: Spira 2b Series
series.description: The Spira 2b Series is the dual-stage version of the Spira 1b, adding a dedicated rinse drum for applications requiring detergent-free parts. Four models match the Spira 1b drum diameter range (12"–37") with extended lengths to accommodate both stages — the SP950/2 runs 208" overall with matched 210-gallon wash and rinse tanks. Each stage operates independently with its own heated solution, pump, and manifold. Specified for parts destined for painting, plating, or precision assembly where detergent residue causes failures. Common in automotive fastener lines, medical device hardware, and high-volume precision stampings. Optional rust prevention, blow-off/drying, filtration, and oil skimmer available.

series.name: Platinum Series
series.description: The Platinum Series is Magido's most advanced rotary immersion washer line — fully automated, multi-stage systems for the most demanding precision cleaning applications. A rotating containment basket ensures all surfaces, including internal passages, are fully exposed to wash and rinse solution throughout the cycle. The PM400 is a two-stage entry model; the P600/2 through P1500/2 are three-stage machines with independent tanks, pumps, and manifolds, Siemens PLC, and Weintek HMI touchscreen. Basket sizes range from 24"×12"×12" (440 lbs) to 59"×31"×34" (1,500 lbs). Specified for aerospace, medical, precision machining, and defense where validated cycle control is required. Comprehensive options include dryer, filtration, oil/water separator, pallet loader, and automatic load/unload.
standardFeatures: Siemens PLC with Weintek HMI Operator Touch Screen
Separate Wash & Rinse Stages with Independent Tanks, Pumps & Manifolds
Digital Temperature Controls with Stainless Steel Heating Elements
Variable-Speed Rotational Drum Drive — basket rotation during wash and rinse
Liquid Level Control & Automatic Water Fill
Marine-Style Cleanout Door for easy tank maintenance
safetyFeatures: NEMA 4 Electrical Panel — splash and dust resistant
Main Power Disconnect Switch with Lock-Out / Tag-Out provision
Overload Protection on Pumps, Rotational Drive & Heaters
Two-Hand Door Operation — prevents door closure during loading
Door Interlock Safety Switch — cycle cannot start with door open
Fluid Level Controls — protects pumps and heating elements

series.name: FLS Series
series.description: The FLS Series is Magido's newest front load spray cabinet line — combining front-door loading with an automatic rotating turntable for full 360° spray coverage. Unlike the X53's fixed platform, the FLS turntable rotates during the wash cycle, eliminating spray shadows on complex parts. Three models offer 30"–45" turntable diameters and up to 1,500-lb capacity. Standard features include a dual-height spray manifold, oil skimmer, auto water fill, and programmable pump timer — a more complete standard spec than comparable machines. Ideal for large castings, gearbox components, and any application where front loading and full rotation are both needed.

series.name: TR-450
series.description: The TR-450 is a compact top load washer built for precision cleaning of small to medium machined components. Instead of a large open turntable, it uses a contained rotational basket (18"×12"×6") that partially immerses parts while spraying from all four sides — combining immersion and spray impingement in one stage. The basket rotates at 0.7–2.5 RPM, tumbling parts through heated solution for thorough coverage of complex geometries and internal features. With a 60-gallon tank and NEMA-4 controls, it's designed for machining cells and toolrooms where cleanliness is tight but part sizes are modest. Ideal for CNC-turned parts, bearing housings, and hydraulic valve bodies.
standardFeatures: Rotational Basket Fixture with Variable Speed (0.7–2.5 RPM)
Stainless Steel Spray Manifolds with Optimized V-Jet Nozzles
Front, Back, and Side Spray Coverage

products.name: L101 Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L101 is an automatic top load spray cabinet parts washer from the X51 Series, featuring a 35" rotating turntable, 46-gallon tank, and 440-lb load capacity. A single spray bar with 22 calibrated V-jet nozzles delivers thorough aqueous cleaning at temperatures up to 150°F, removing oils, coolants, cutting fluids, and metallic fines from small to medium machined parts. The automatic turntable rotates at 7 RPM, ensuring full 360° spray coverage without manual repositioning. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel with an adjustable heater, programmable timer, and fluid level sensor, the L101 is the entry-level model in the X51 Series — the right fit for shops that need reliable automated spray cleaning in a compact footprint. Options include filtration, drying, and oil skimmer.
products.cardDescription: Entry-level X51 — 35" turntable, 46 gal tank, 440 lb capacity. Single spray bar, V-jet nozzles, temperatures up to 150°F.

products.name: L102 Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L102 is an automatic top load spray cabinet parts washer from the X51 Series, sharing the 35" turntable, 46-gallon tank, and 440-lb load capacity of the L101 but upgrading to a dual spray bar configuration. Two 304 stainless steel manifolds with 44 V-jet nozzles deliver twice the cleaning coverage of the L101, making the L102 better suited for heavier contamination loads — cutting oils, forming compounds, carbon deposits, and tenacious greases — on parts that fit the same 35" turntable. The automatic turntable rotates at 7 RPM for full surface coverage. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with adjustable heater, programmable timer, and fluid level sensor. Options include filtration, drying, and oil skimmer.
products.cardDescription: 35" turntable, 46 gal tank — dual spray bars double the nozzle count over the L101 for heavier contamination loads up to 440 lbs.

products.name: L122 Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L122 is an automatic top load spray cabinet parts washer from the X51 Series, stepping up to a 45" turntable with a 74-gallon tank and 770-lb load capacity — handling a significantly larger part envelope than the 35" L101 and L102 models. Two 304 stainless steel spray bars with 44 V-jet nozzles deliver thorough coverage across the full turntable diameter at temperatures up to 150°F. The 7 RPM rotating turntable ensures all part surfaces reach the spray zone without manual intervention. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout, the L122 is the right choice when parts are too large for the 35" models but a front-load machine would be overkill. Options include filtration, drying, and oil skimmer.
products.cardDescription: 45" turntable, 74 gal tank, 770 lb capacity — handles a significantly larger part envelope than the 35" models. Dual spray bars, 44 nozzles.

products.name: L152 Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L152 is the largest model in the X51 Series, featuring a 51" turntable, 80-gallon tank, and 770-lb load capacity — the maximum top-load spray cabinet configuration in this line. Two spray bars with 58 V-jet nozzles cover the full 51" turntable sweep, delivering consistent aqueous cleaning at temperatures up to 150°F across large fabricated components, transmission cases, and oversized machined parts that would otherwise require a front-load machine. The 7 RPM rotating turntable provides complete surface coverage without manual handling. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with adjustable heater, programmable timer, and fluid level sensor. Options include filtration, drying, and oil skimmer.
products.cardDescription: Largest X51 — 51" turntable, 80 gal tank, 770 lb capacity. Dual spray bars with 58 nozzles cover the full turntable sweep.

products.name: G200 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G200 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring an 8" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 90-gallon wash tank. Parts are placed on the belt and carried through precision spray zones at 1–5 fpm — adjustable for tunable dwell time based on contamination level. Heated aqueous detergent removes oils, greases, coolants, and machining residues continuously without batching or operator handling. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel with temperature control and programmable wash cycles, the G200 is the entry-level Gold 1b model — best suited for small fasteners, turned parts, and precision components that fit within a narrow 8" conveyor lane.
products.cardDescription: Entry Gold 1b — 8" belt, 90 gal wash tank. Belt speed 1–5 fpm. Targets small fasteners, turned parts, and narrow conveyor lines.

products.name: G300 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G300 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 12" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 90-gallon wash tank. The wider belt accommodates slightly larger parts or allows more parts per pass compared to the G200, while the same 90-gallon tank and 1–5 fpm belt speed provide equivalent cleaning performance. Parts travel continuously through heated aqueous spray zones without batching. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with adjustable belt speed, temperature control, and programmable cycles. Suited for machined components, stampings, and small brackets requiring automated inline cleaning.
products.cardDescription: 12" belt, 90 gal wash tank — slightly wider than the G200 for more parts per pass or wider components on the same production line.

products.name: G400 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G400 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 16" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 90-gallon wash tank. The 16" belt width is a practical mid-range choice for operations cleaning a mixed variety of part sizes on the same production line. Belt speed is adjustable from 1–5 fpm to tune dwell time for different contamination levels. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable wash cycles. Well-suited for automotive components, machined housings, and mixed-part production lines where more belt width flexibility is needed than the G200 or G300 provide.
products.cardDescription: 16" belt, 90 gal wash tank — mid-range belt width suited for automotive components, machined housings, and mixed-part lines.

products.name: G500 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G500 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 20" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 120-gallon wash tank. The step up to 120 gallons — over the 90-gallon G200–G400 models — reduces solution temperature drop under continuous load, making the G500 better suited for sustained high-throughput production shifts. Belt speed is adjustable from 1–5 fpm. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable cycles. The right choice when medium-sized parts or higher production rates require more solution stability than the smaller-tank models can maintain.
products.cardDescription: 20" belt, 120 gal wash tank — expanded tank reduces temperature drop under continuous load. Handles medium-sized parts at higher throughput.

products.name: G600 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G600 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 23" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 120-gallon wash tank. Parts up to roughly 20" wide clean in a single pass without repositioning, making the G600 well-suited for connecting rods, valve bodies, engine brackets, and medium fabricated components. Belt speed adjusts from 1–5 fpm for tunable dwell time. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable cycles. The G600 bridges the gap between mid-range and wide belt configurations without the larger footprint of the G700 and above.
products.cardDescription: 23" belt, 120 gal wash tank. Parts up to ~20" wide clean in a single pass — suited for connecting rods, valve bodies, and medium fabricated components.

products.name: G700 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G700 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 27" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 120-gallon wash tank. The 27" belt handles parts too wide for the mid-range G500 and G600 without requiring the largest Gold 1b configurations. Belt speed adjusts from 1–5 fpm. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable cycles. A strong choice for gear housings, medium castings, and stamped assemblies in automotive and machining production lines where belt width is the deciding factor.
products.cardDescription: 27" belt, 120 gal wash tank. Handles parts too wide for mid-range models without stepping up to the widest Gold 1b configuration.

products.name: G800 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G800 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 31" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 140-gallon wash tank. Parts up to approximately 28" wide clean without manual reorientation, and the 140-gallon tank maintains stable solution temperature through high-load production shifts. Belt speed adjusts from 1–5 fpm. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable cycles. Designed for heavy production environments cleaning engine components, transmission cases, and large machined parts at sustained throughput rates.
products.cardDescription: 31" belt, 140 gal wash tank. Parts up to ~28" wide clean without reorientation — built for engine components, transmission cases, and large machined parts.

products.name: G900 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G900 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 35" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 140-gallon wash tank — one of the widest configurations in the Gold 1b line. The high solution volume ensures stable operating temperature under continuous load, and the 35" belt accommodates large stamped panels, engine blocks, and industrial components that exceed the capacity of the mid-range Gold models. Belt speed adjusts from 1–5 fpm. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable cycles.
products.cardDescription: 35" belt, 140 gal wash tank — one of the widest Gold 1b configurations. High solution volume maintains temperature stability under continuous load.

products.name: G1000 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G1000 is the widest single-stage model in the Gold 1b Series, featuring a 39" wide stainless steel mesh belt and a 140-gallon wash tank. It accommodates the largest parts that can pass through an inline belt conveyor, making it the top choice for high-volume production operations cleaning large industrial components, structural weldments, and wide stampings that exceed the capacity of all narrower Gold 1b models. Belt speed adjusts from 1–5 fpm for tunable dwell time. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with temperature control and programmable cycles.
products.cardDescription: 39" belt, 140 gal wash tank — widest Gold 1b model. Accommodates the largest parts that can pass through an inline belt conveyor.

products.name: G200/2 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G200/2 is a dual-stage in-line belt conveyor parts washer from the Gold 2b Series, featuring an 8" wide stainless steel mesh belt with separate 90-gallon wash and rinse tanks. The sequential wash-then-rinse cycle eliminates detergent residue — essential for parts going directly to coating, plating, anodizing, or precision assembly where surface cleanliness is verified. Belt speed adjusts from 1–5 fpm. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout with independent temperature control per tank and programmable cycles. The G200/2 is the entry-level dual-stage Gold model — best for small precision components on narrow conveyor lines where residue-free output is required.
products.cardDescription: Entry dual-stage Gold — 8" belt, separate 90 gal wash and rinse tanks. Residue-free output for parts going to coating, plating, or precision assembly.

products.name: S200 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer

The lower 32" loading height makes the S200 easier to integrate ergonomically into existing lines without platform modifications. The Silver Series is designed for operations needing automated inline cleaning in a compact footprint where the Gold Series would be oversized.

products.name: S300 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer

The 12" belt accommodates more parts per pass or slightly wider components compared to the S200, while maintaining the same compact Silver footprint and lower loading height. products.cardDescription: 12" belt, 40 gal tank, 32" loading height — more parts per pass than the S200 in the same compact Silver footprint.

products.name: S400 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer

products.name: DG-8 Manual Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido DG-8 is a sink-style manual aqueous parts washer built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, featuring a 33.5" × 19.5" work surface, a 26.5-gallon heated tank, and a 2 kW thermostat-controlled heater. An external magnetic drive pump circulates heated water-based detergent through a flow-through brush, allowing operators to manually degrease small to medium parts up to 300 lbs. The sink design gives hands-on control for irregularly shaped components, tooling, and shop parts where an automated machine would be impractical. Standard features include a liquid level shut-off to protect the heater and pump. The DG-8's smaller 26.5-gallon tank is suited for lower-volume shops where solution economy matters. Optional cartridge filter and casters available.
products.cardDescription: Sink-style manual washer — 33.5" × 19.5" work surface, 26.5 gal tank, 2 kW heater. Flow-through brush for hands-on degreasing up to 300 lbs.

products.name: DG-9 Manual Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido DG-9 is a sink-style manual aqueous parts washer built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, featuring a 33.5" × 19.5" work surface, a 34.5-gallon heated tank, and a 2 kW thermostat-controlled heater. It shares the same work surface dimensions and pump system as the DG-8 but increases tank capacity to 34.5 gallons — providing approximately 30% more solution volume for longer cleaning intervals between changes and better performance under higher-frequency use or heavier contamination loads. An external magnetic drive pump circulates solution through a flow-through brush for hands-on degreasing of parts up to 300 lbs. Standard features include a liquid level shut-off. Optional cartridge filter and casters available.
products.cardDescription: Sink-style manual washer — 33.5" × 19.5" work surface, 34.5 gal tank. Larger solution volume than the DG-8 for higher-frequency use.

The open-top vat design allows operators to soak and manually scrub parts using a flow-through brush and heated aqueous detergent — particularly effective for removing heavy grease, carbon deposits, and built-up contamination from engine parts, gearbox components, and shop tooling. A 2 kW thermostat-controlled heater and external magnetic drive pump maintain solution temperature and circulation. The L-7 is the compact model in the L Series, suited for smaller shops or secondary cleaning stations where a full automated machine isn't justified. Optional cartridge filter and casters available.
products.cardDescription: Vat-style manual washer — 19" × 27.5" work area, 24 gal tank. Open-top design for soaking and manual cleaning with heated aqueous solution.

The enclosed cabinet keeps overspray contained and the operator dry. Standard features include an LED-illuminated cabinet, ergonomic spray wand, window-clearing blower, thermostat-controlled heater, liquid level sensor, low water shut-off, removable work tray, and screened filter basket. The HP-25 is the compact model — ideal for automotive service bays, transmission shops, and maintenance facilities where floor space is limited.

An optional heavy-duty turntable configuration is available to increase load capacity up to 5,000 lbs for oversized industrial components.
products.cardDescription: 35.5" load height, 1,500 lb, dual-stage — taller working envelope than the L162 for large components requiring both height clearance and residue-free cleaning. Optional 5,000 lb capacity upgrade available.

products.name: L212 Front Load Dual Stage Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L212 is a dual-stage front load spray cabinet washer from the X53/2 Series, featuring a 39" load height and 1,500-lb load capacity with separate wash and rinse tanks. The 39" load height provides the maximum vertical clearance available in the X53/2 line, accommodating the tallest large components while adding the dedicated rinse stage that the single-stage L210 lacks. PLC-controlled sequential wash-then-rinse cycle prevents cross-contamination. The removable turntable transfers to a mobile cart for safe loading. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel with temperatures up to 160°F. An optional heavy-duty turntable configuration is available to increase load capacity up to 5,000 lbs for oversized industrial components.
products.cardDescription: 39" load height, 1,500 lb, dual-stage — vertical clearance of the L210 single-stage model with the added dedicated rinse cycle. Optional 5,000 lb capacity upgrade available.

products.name: L242 Front Load Dual Stage Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L242 is the largest model in the X53/2 Series, featuring a 39" load height and 1,500-lb load capacity with the highest wash and rinse solution capacities in the dual-stage front load line. Designed for operations where part size, contamination severity, and cleanliness standard all demand maximum performance — the L242 delivers the largest front-load dual-stage configuration available. PLC-controlled sequential cycle and independent tank heaters maintain precise process control. The removable turntable transfers to a mobile cart. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel with temperatures up to 160°F. An optional heavy-duty turntable configuration is available to increase load capacity up to 5,000 lbs for oversized industrial components.
products.cardDescription: Largest X53/2 — 39" load height, 1,500 lb, highest solution capacities in the dual-stage front load line. Maximum wash and rinse volume for the most demanding applications. Optional 5,000 lb capacity upgrade available.

products.name: A700 Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido A700 is a top load immersion parts washer from the Agita Series, featuring a 70-gallon tank and 180-lb load capacity. Parts are lowered into heated aqueous cleaning solution by a pneumatic platform that oscillates during the cleaning cycle, driving solution into blind holes, internal passages, threaded features, and complex geometries that spray washing alone cannot reach — making the Agita Series the right choice for precision components where complete surface contact with the cleaning solution is required. Operating at temperatures up to 167°F, the A700 is the entry-level Agita model suited for smaller precision components, instrument parts, and machined assemblies. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: Entry Agita — 70 gal tank, 180 lb capacity. Pneumatic platform lowers parts into heated solution and oscillates to drive cleaning into blind holes and internal passages.

products.name: A900 Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido A900 is a top load immersion parts washer from the Agita Series, featuring a 100-gallon tank and 550-lb load capacity — significantly more capable than the A700 for larger and heavier precision parts. The pneumatic oscillating platform lowers parts into heated aqueous solution (up to 167°F) and agitates to drive cleaning action into blind holes, internal passages, and complex geometries. The 100-gallon tank accommodates parts with greater surface area and provides more solution stability than the A700. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. The A900 is well-suited for medium-sized castings, hydraulic components, manifolds, and precision assemblies that require full immersion agitation.
products.cardDescription: 100 gal tank, 550 lb capacity — significantly larger than the A700 for heavier parts requiring full immersion agitation to clean complex geometries.

products.name: A1100 Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido A1100 is a top load immersion parts washer from the Agita Series, featuring a 140-gallon tank and 550-lb load capacity — sharing the A900's weight rating but increasing solution volume by 40%. The larger tank is particularly beneficial for parts with significant internal volume — manifolds, cylinder heads, hydraulic blocks, and complex castings that displace a large portion of solution when submerged, which can cause temperature drop and reduced cleaning effectiveness in smaller-tank models. The pneumatic oscillating platform drives heated solution (up to 167°F) into all internal features. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: 140 gal tank, 550 lb capacity — more solution volume than the A900 for parts with large internal volume like manifolds, cylinder heads, and hydraulic blocks.

products.name: A1300 Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido A1300 is the largest model in the Agita Series, featuring a 180-gallon tank and 550-lb load capacity — the maximum solution volume in the immersion line. Designed for facilities with the highest throughput requirements, the most demanding parts, or applications where continuous operation requires maximum solution stability and the longest intervals between changes. The pneumatic oscillating platform drives heated aqueous solution (up to 167°F) into blind holes, internal passages, and complex geometries. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. The A1300 is the definitive choice when the A1100's 140-gallon tank is insufficient for the cleaning load.
products.cardDescription: Largest Agita — 180 gal tank, 550 lb capacity. Maximum solution volume in the immersion series for the highest throughput or most demanding cleaning loads.

products.name: J320 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido J320 is a single-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Jolly Series, featuring a 12" diameter × 47" helical auger drum. Small loose parts — fasteners, stampings, turned components, and small machined parts — are loaded into one end of the rotating drum and carried continuously through the heated wash zone by the internal helix, emerging clean at the other end for non-stop processing without batching. Heated aqueous detergent removes oils, coolants, chips, and contaminants effectively. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. The J320 is a single-stage wash-only system suited for lower-volume operations where a rinse stage is not required.
products.cardDescription: Single-stage Jolly — 12" × 47" drum. Helical auger carries small loose parts continuously from entry to exit through the heated wash zone without batching.

products.name: J320/2 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido J320/2 is a dual-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Jolly Series, featuring a 12" diameter × 71" helical auger drum — the same drum diameter as the J320 but extended to incorporate a dedicated rinse zone after the wash stage. The added rinse cycle delivers residue-free output, making the J320/2 the right choice for small parts going directly to coating, plating, anodizing, or precision assembly where detergent residue is unacceptable. Parts travel continuously from entry to exit without batching. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel with heated aqueous detergent. Same compact drum diameter as the J320 with the added benefit of a clean rinse.
products.cardDescription: Dual-stage Jolly — 12" × 71" drum. Adds a rinse zone after the wash for residue-free output on small parts going to coating, plating, or precision assembly.

products.name: SP320 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP320 is a single-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Spira 1b Series, featuring a 12" diameter × 67" drum and a production rate of approximately 3.2 cubic feet per hour. Unlike the Jolly Series which uses spray-only washing, the Spira combines spray and full immersion washing in a single continuous pass — the rotating drum carries parts through a spray zone and then submerges them in the heated wash solution, providing more thorough cleaning of complex geometries. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. The SP320 is the entry Spira 1b model suited for small parts — fasteners, turned components, and small stampings — at production volumes where the compact 12" drum is sufficient.
products.cardDescription: Entry Spira 1b — 12" drum, ~3.2 CFH. Combines spray and immersion washing in a single continuous pass for small fasteners and turned components.

products.name: SP480 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP480 is a single-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Spira 1b Series, featuring a 19" diameter × 98" drum and approximately 6.4 CFH production rate — roughly twice the throughput of the SP320. The larger 19" drum accommodates slightly larger individual parts and handles greater batch volumes per pass, making it the right step up when the SP320's capacity or output rate has been exceeded. Combines spray and immersion washing in a single continuous pass. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel with heated aqueous detergent.
products.cardDescription: 19" drum, ~6.4 CFH — roughly twice the SP320's throughput. Larger drum accommodates slightly larger parts and greater batch volumes per pass.

products.name: SP640 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP640 is a single-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Spira 1b Series, featuring a 25" diameter × 98" drum and approximately 12.7 CFH production rate — about four times the SP320's throughput. The 25" drum handles medium-sized parts and higher production volumes that exceed the SP480's capacity. Combines spray and immersion washing in a single continuous pass for thorough contaminant removal. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel with heated aqueous detergent. The SP640 is a mid-to-high volume solution for operations that have outgrown the smaller Spira models.
products.cardDescription: 25" drum, ~12.7 CFH — approximately four times the SP320's throughput. Handles medium-sized parts at mid-volume production.

products.name: SP950 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP950 is the largest single-stage model in the Spira 1b Series, featuring a 37" diameter × 150" drum and a 25 CFH production rate — the maximum throughput in the rotary drum line. The 37" drum and extended length accommodate larger parts and the highest production volumes available in the Spira configuration. Combines spray and immersion washing in a single continuous pass. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel with heated aqueous detergent. The SP950 is designed for high-volume manufacturing operations where drum diameter and capacity are the limiting factors for throughput.
products.cardDescription: Largest Spira 1b — 37" drum, 150" length, 25 CFH. Maximum throughput and drum capacity in the single-stage rotary drum line.

products.name: SP320/2 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP320/2 is a dual-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Spira 2b Series, featuring a 12" diameter × 106" drum — the same 12" diameter as the SP320 but extended to incorporate a dedicated rinse zone after the wash stage. The dual-stage process delivers residue-free output for small parts going to coating, plating, or precision assembly. Combines spray and immersion washing in the wash stage, followed by a clean rinse, all in a continuous pass without batching. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. The SP320/2 delivers the SP320's cleaning performance with residue-free results.
products.cardDescription: Dual-stage Spira — 12" drum, 106" length. Adds a dedicated rinse zone after the wash for residue-free output at the same compact drum diameter as the SP320.

products.name: SP480/2 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP480/2 is a dual-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Spira 2b Series, featuring a 19" diameter × 138" drum and approximately 6.4 CFH production rate. The 138" drum incorporates both a wash stage (spray + immersion) and a dedicated rinse stage, delivering residue-free output at the same throughput as the single-stage SP480. The 19" drum handles slightly larger parts than the 12" SP320/2 models. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. The right choice when the SP480's throughput is needed but parts must emerge residue-free for downstream finishing.
products.cardDescription: 19" drum, 138" dual-stage length, ~6.4 CFH. SP480 throughput with a dedicated rinse stage for residue-free output before downstream finishing.

products.name: SP640/2 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP640/2 is a dual-stage rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Spira 2b Series, featuring a 25" diameter × 138" drum and approximately 12.7 CFH production rate. It delivers the SP640's mid-range throughput with an added dedicated rinse stage for residue-free output. The 25" drum handles medium-sized parts at production volumes that exceed the smaller dual-stage models. Combines spray and immersion washing followed by a clean rinse in a single continuous pass. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. Suited for medium-volume operations where parts must emerge residue-free.
products.cardDescription: 25" drum, 138" dual-stage length, ~12.7 CFH. Mid-range throughput with a clean rinse cycle for medium-sized parts requiring residue-free results.

products.name: SP950/2 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido SP950/2 is the largest dual-stage model in the Spira 2b Series, featuring a 37" diameter × 208" drum and 25 CFH production rate — the maximum throughput in the rotary drum line with a dedicated rinse stage. The 208" dual-stage drum delivers both spray-plus-immersion washing and a full clean rinse in a single continuous pass at maximum production capacity. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. The SP950/2 is designed for the most demanding high-volume bulk cleaning operations where maximum throughput and residue-free output are both required.
products.cardDescription: Largest dual-stage Spira — 37" drum, 208" length, 25 CFH. Maximum throughput in the rotary drum line with a dedicated rinse for residue-free production output.

products.name: PM400 Rotary Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido PM400 is a 2-stage rotary immersion parts washer from the Platinum Series — the entry-level model and the only 2-stage configuration in the line, featuring wash and rinse phases without a dedicated third stage. The Platinum Series cleaning process combines three simultaneous actions: direct spray impingement, full hydraulic immersion purging, and rotational agitation of the containment basket. This multi-action approach cleans complex precision components with internal bores, channels, and blind passages more thoroughly than spray-only or immersion-only systems. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel. The PM400 is suited for turbine components, valve bodies, hydraulic manifolds, and precision machined assemblies requiring thorough, repeatable cleaning — a practical entry point for facilities moving from spray-only to multi-action cleaning.
products.cardDescription: Entry Platinum — 2-stage wash + rinse. Combines direct spray impingement, full immersion, and rotational agitation for precision components with complex internal geometries.

products.name: P600/2 Rotary Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido P600/2 is a 3-stage rotary immersion parts washer from the Platinum Series, featuring a 24" × 12" × 12" containment basket and 440-lb load capacity. Built to order, the P600/2 adds a dedicated third stage — typically a hot-air drying cycle or additional rinse — beyond the PM400's 2-stage process. The three-stage sequence supports IQ/OQ/PQ validation protocols for aerospace, automotive transmission, and medical device cleaning applications where a documented, repeatable process is required. Combines direct spray impingement, full immersion, and rotational agitation. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: 3-stage Platinum — 24" × 12" × 12" basket, 440 lb. Built to order. Wash, rinse, plus third stage for aerospace, automotive, and medical precision components.

products.name: P900/2 Rotary Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido P900/2 is a 3-stage rotary immersion parts washer from the Platinum Series, featuring a 35" × 15" × 15" containment basket and 770-lb load capacity — handling significantly larger and heavier parts than the P600/2 while maintaining the full 3-stage cleaning sequence. The larger basket accommodates medium-sized precision assemblies, complex manifolds, hydraulic components, and structural parts that exceed the P600/2's envelope. Built to order with customer-specific process configurations. Combines direct spray impingement, full immersion, and rotational agitation. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: 3-stage Platinum — 35" × 15" × 15" basket, 770 lb. Larger envelope than the P600/2 for medium-sized precision assemblies, manifolds, and complex geometry parts.

products.name: P1200/2 Rotary Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido P1200/2 is a 3-stage rotary immersion parts washer from the Platinum Series, featuring a 47" × 19" × 19" containment basket and 1,100-lb load capacity. Designed for large, heavy precision components in aerospace, automotive, and heavy industrial applications where both basket size and cleanliness standard are demanding. The P1200/2 delivers the full Platinum Series multi-action cleaning process — spray impingement, full immersion, and rotational agitation — at a scale suited for large structural components and heavy assemblies. Built to order from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: 3-stage Platinum — 47" × 19" × 19" basket, 1,100 lb. Built to order for large, heavy precision components in aerospace, automotive, and heavy industrial applications.

products.name: P1500/2 Rotary Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido P1500/2 is the largest model in the Platinum Series, featuring a 59" × 31" × 34" containment basket and 1,500-lb load capacity — the maximum configuration in the rotary immersion line. Built for the largest, heaviest precision components in aerospace, defense, and heavy industrial applications where no other cleaning method can achieve the required cleanliness standard at this part size. Delivers the full Platinum multi-action process: direct spray impingement, full hydraulic immersion purging, and rotational agitation across all three stages. Built to order from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: Largest Platinum — 59" × 31" × 34" basket, 1,500 lb. Maximum rotary immersion capacity for the largest precision components in aerospace and defense applications.

products.name: FLS-30 Front Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido FLS-30 is a front load spray cabinet parts washer from the FLS Series, featuring a 30" turntable, 60-gallon tank, 2 HP pump, and 1,200-lb weight capacity in a compact 50" × 60" × 72" footprint. The front-loading door provides easy access for loading medium to large parts, and the FLS Series' fixed spray nozzle configuration delivers thorough automated aqueous cleaning at temperatures up to 140°F. Safety interlocks and programmable wash cycles are standard. The FLS-30 is the entry model and the most space-efficient configuration in the FLS line — suited for automotive service, diesel maintenance, and industrial facilities that need automated front-load spray cleaning without a large floor area commitment.
products.cardDescription: Entry FLS — 30" turntable, 60 gal tank, 2 HP pump, 1,200 lb. Most compact front-load option in the FLS line at 50" × 60" × 72".

products.name: FLS-35 Front Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido FLS-35 is a front load spray cabinet parts washer from the FLS Series, featuring a 35" turntable, 70-gallon tank, 3 HP pump, and 1,200-lb weight capacity. Compared to the FLS-30, the FLS-35 provides a larger turntable, 10 more gallons of solution, and a more powerful pump — delivering more aggressive cleaning for medium-to-large parts with heavier contamination loads like gear oils, hydraulic fluids, and baked-on industrial grease. The front-loading door and fixed spray nozzle system deliver automated aqueous cleaning at temperatures up to 140°F. Safety interlocks and programmable wash cycles are standard. The FLS-35 is the mid-range model — a step up in cleaning intensity within a similar cabinet size.
products.cardDescription: 35" turntable, 70 gal tank, 3 HP pump, 1,200 lb — more cleaning power than the FLS-30 for medium-to-large parts with heavier contamination loads.

products.name: FLS-45 Front Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido FLS-45 is the largest model in the FLS Series, featuring a 45" turntable, 130-gallon tank, 5.5 HP pump, and 1,500-lb weight capacity in a 64" × 90" × 83" cabinet. The 5.5 HP pump delivers substantially more spray pressure and flow than the FLS-30 and FLS-35, making the FLS-45 well-suited for the most demanding front-load cleaning applications — heavily contaminated automotive components, large diesel engine parts, heavy equipment maintenance, and industrial overhaul operations. The front-loading door provides easy access for the largest parts in the FLS range. Safety interlocks and programmable wash cycles are standard. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel throughout.
products.cardDescription: Largest FLS — 45" turntable, 130 gal tank, 5.5 HP pump, 1,500 lb. Maximum FLS capacity at 64" × 90" × 83" for demanding automotive and heavy equipment applications.

products.name: TR-450 Top Load Spray/Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido TR-450 is a compact, ergonomically designed top load parts washer purpose-built for precision cleaning of machined components in manufacturing cell environments. Unlike standard top-load spray cabinets, the TR-450 uses a rotating basket that is simultaneously sprayed from the front, back, and sides while partially submerging during the cleaning cycle — combining spray impingement and immersion in a single automated process that ensures uniform coverage and complete contamination removal on complex small to medium-sized parts. A variable-speed basket rotation of 0.7–2.5 RPM, 60-gallon tank, 2 HP pump, and NEMA-4 rated control panel make the TR-450 a reliable, integration-ready cleaning cell for CNC machining environments. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel.
products.cardDescription: Compact top load washer for precision machined components — rotating basket sprayed from all sides while partially submerging. 60 gal tank, 2 HP pump, NEMA-4 panel.
